name: Elks 797 Golf Club
about: Elks 797 Golf Club is a hidden gem golf course located in Wilmington, OH, offering both a traditional outdoor course and an indoor golf simulator facility. The outdoor course is a scenic and challenging 18-hole layout with a history dating back to 1960, featuring picturesque landscapes and a signature island green on hole #12. The indoor facility houses two Full Swing Golf simulators, providing access to 90 world-renowned courses and a practice area for all-weather play. The venue combines a welcoming community atmosphere with modern technology, making it suitable for both traditional golfers and simulator enthusiasts.
why_golfers_like_it: Two Full Swing simulators with access to 90 top-tier courses worldwide
All-weather practice facility with Golf Digest's top-rated technology
Scenic and challenging 18-hole course with rich history
On-site lodge and bar + grill for social events and dining

food_and_drink.notes: On-site lodge with a bar + grill offering food service
Full bar service available at the lodge's bar + grill

simulator_hardware.notes: Two units with up to 90 top courses; Golf Digest's top simulator for 3 years

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players must bring their own clubs for simulator sessions. The facility offers a practice area for work on your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink may not be allowed, but the on-site lodge bar + grill offers a full menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulation typically takes 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Elks 797 Golf Club welcomes families and offers a family-friendly atmosphere suitable for juniors and youth golfers.
